# Pull Request Template for FeverCode

## Summary
A concise description of the changes and their motivation.

## Changes
- List of changes included in this PR.

## Testing
- How you validated the changes: unit tests, integration tests, manual checks.
- Any test failures and how they were addressed.

## Safety impact
- Any safety considerations or risk introduced by this PR.

## Documentation
- Documentation changes or notes for the README/docs site.
